content.en:
Ghost Fox Organization, a branch,

As one of the Ten Emperors of the Ghost Fox Organization, the Battle Royalty Domain Ancestor was extremely angry at the moment.

The Ten Emperors of the Ghost Fox Organization represent the ten extremely powerful Invincible Domain Ancestors, all of whom have been promoted from the four-star kings and have almost cultivated to the extreme realm, and their combat power is stronger than that of the Blood Gang Domain Ancestors.

In fact, the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor only belonged to the middle and upper echelons among the invincible domain ancestors of the Battle Gate, and it was not too powerful.

The reputation of the Sparrow Battle Domain Ancestor is even stronger than that of the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor, and he even has the record of escaping from the supreme domain ancestor.

The strongest domain ancestor on the supreme list is sure to kill the weaker invincible domain ancestor, but the invincible domain ancestor wants to kill the superior domain ancestor but almost can't do it, because there are almost no weak people who can be promoted to the superior domain ancestor, they are all real geniuses, and even almost all of the supreme domain ancestors on the supreme list or the level geniuses of the four-star king are promoted.

Therefore, if the Invincible Domain Ancestor wants to kill the Invincible Domain Ancestor, it is a dream, and it is difficult for even the Holy Endowment to do so.

Therefore, the Bird Battle Domain Ancestor was able to escape from the hands of the Superior Domain Ancestor, such a record was really brilliant.

"Damn the Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor, not only did he kill the two four-star kings of our Ghost Fox Organization, but he also dared to threaten to provoke the strongest Domain Ancestor of our Ghost Fox Organization!!!"

The Bird Battle Domain Ancestor said coldly.

If the other party was not the strongest domain ancestor of the Battle Gate, he would have already pinched the other party to death.

But he couldn't do that!

Now, Zhanmen has even issued this statement, if he dares to make a move against Ye Tian, even if he really kills Ye Tian, Zhanmen will not let him go, and will even send a top-notch Peerless Domain Ancestor to sweep away their Ghost Fox Organization.

At that time, the ancestor behind the Ghost Fox Organization will not come forward, after all, it was the Ghost Fox Organization that broke the rules first.

Moreover, the Battle Gate is one of the ten holy gates, where does the Ghost Fox Organization dare to fight against the Battle Gate, isn't that looking for death?

Even if the strong man of the Battle Gate is now caught in the battle for the Primordial Ancestral Realm, he can send a strong man to destroy the Ghost Fox Organization.

Therefore, the Sparrow Battle Domain Ancestor can only roar angrily in this branch now, and he doesn't dare to really find the battle gate theory.

Soon, the Sparrow Battle Domain Ancestor calmed down.

Subsequently, he began to investigate the information of the Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor and confirmed the general strength of the Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestors.

Although the Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor killed the two four-star kings, the Ghost Shadow Domain Ancestor and the Dark Ghost Domain Ancestor, it was actually with the help of the power of the Xuanxu Holy Realm, and the real power was estimated to be similar to the Ghost Shadow Domain Ancestor and the Dark Ghost Domain Ancestor, or a little stronger.

The strength of most of the four-star kings in the Ghost Fox Organization is about the same as that of the Ghost Shadow Domain Ancestor, even if they can defeat the Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor, they probably can't kill the Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor.

At this time, the Bird Battle Domain Ancestor thought of someone.

this day.

The Bird War Domain Ancestor came to the Dark Sanctuary Chaos Void River.

The Void River of Chaos is a forbidden place in the Dark Sanctuary, which is filled with the power of chaos and is very dangerous, even ordinary Supreme Domain Ancestors dare not come here, otherwise they will easily fall and die.

However, for some Supreme Domain Ancestors and Invincible Domain Ancestors, this is another treasure land.

Because the chaotic power of the Chaotic Void River is the favorite source of energy for the Domain Ancestor who walks the Path of Chaos, the strongest Domain Ancestor and the invincible who take the Path of Chaos like to retreat here for a long time.

Rumble!!!!

The Sparrow War Domain Ancestor stepped into the Chaotic Void River, and flew towards the depths of the Chaotic Void River with the power of the Chaotic Void River.

"The power of chaos is so annoying!"

The Sparrow Battle Domain Ancestor said coldly.

He didn't like this kind of power very much, as if his whole body was in chaos, and his soul was affected a little.

If he hadn't come here to find someone, he wouldn't have come here at all.

Soon, the Bird War Domain Ancestor saw a mansion, a mansion built in the depths of the Chaotic Void River.

"Qingyang Domain Ancestor, I'm here!"

The Sparrow Battle Domain Ancestor spoke.

Wow!

A phantom figure appeared in the mansion, and it was a young man with black and white eyes.

This person is the Qingyang Domain Ancestor.

Qingyang Domain Ancestor was not prominent in the Dark Saint Domain, and he had hardly made a move, so many powerhouses and forces did not know that the Ghost Fox Organization had such a person as Qingyang Domain Ancestor.

"Qingyang has seen the Sparrow Battle Domain Ancestor!"

Qingyang said respectfully.

As one of the four-star kings, even if he was the most powerful four-star king of the Ghost Fox Organization, he still didn't dare to be disrespectful to the Bird Battle Domain Ancestor.

After all, the Bird War Domain Ancestor was one of the Ten Emperors of the Ghost Fox Organization.

However, he wouldn't be too afraid of the Sparrow Battle Domain Ancestor.

He felt that he would also be able to reach the level of the Sparrow Battle Domain Ancestor in the future, so he was very calm to face the Sparrow War Domain Ancestor.

"Qingyang Domain Ancestor, I have a task for you!"

The Sparrow Battle Domain Ancestor arranged.

"What task?"

Qingyang Domain Ancestor was a little curious.

When he reached his level, he was immediately in the realm of impacting the Invincible Domain Ancestor.

It stands to reason that the Ghost Fox Organization will not give him a task, why is he given a task now, and it is the Bird War Domain Ancestor who came in person.

The Bird War Domain Ancestor told Ye Tian about it, and then said, "I want you to make a move and kill the Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestor." You can rest assured, even if you kill the Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Laws Domain, it will be a battle to kill him, and even the Battle Gate will not retaliate. If the War Gate dares to retaliate, the ancestor behind us will not care!"

Qingyang Domain Ancestor frowned, this matter didn't feel good for him, only harmful.

But he couldn't refuse, after all, this was the mission of the Ghost Fox Organization, and he was a member of the Ghost Fox Organization.

But he knew very well that killing a saint-endowed person was no joke!

Although the Bird War Domain Ancestor said that the Holy Endowment was not the heir of the Ancestor, they were ninety percent sure that they would dare to say so, but what if it was?

In that case, even the ancestor behind him won't be able to protect him!

He knew very well that the Ghost Fox Organization was just a pawn in the game between the ancestors, perhaps trying to lure out the ancestor who might exist behind Ye Tian.

Otherwise, no one would dare to deal with a saint-endowed person like this.

"I need the inheritance of the three holy techniques, and I also want to enter the Chaos Realm Death Cloud Valley for a chance to comprehend! This is the price of my move! Moreover, I will only make a move if the other four-star kings of the Ghost Fox Organization are unable to deal with the Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor!" Qingyang Domain Ancestor put forward his own request.

The Sparrow Domain Ancestor frowned, it was really a bit too much for the Qingyang Domain Ancestor to ask.

"Wait, I'll go and ask the chief!"

Ancestral Dao of the Sparrow War Domain.

Subsequently, the Bird War Domain Ancestor contacted the leader of the Ghost Fox Organization.

Not long after, the Bird Battle Domain Ancestor finally got an answer, and said to the Qingyang Domain Ancestor: "Yes, the leader has already agreed." But if you don't need to make a move in the end, these rewards will not be given to you, and only if you make a move, and kill the opponent or severely damage the opponent, you will be given this reward! But you have the Cause and Effect Divine Technique, and we need you to use the Cause and Effect Divine Technique to kill his body through his clone! Your Cause and Effect Divine Technique is very rare, even the Battle Gate would not have expected that our Ghost Fox Organization would have such a powerful domain ancestor as you. "

"No problem!"

Qingyang Domain Ancestor nodded.

There is no difference between the clone and the main body for him, as long as he wants to kill, if the other party's body does not come, he will still fall and die.

This is his self-confidence, and it is also the reason why the Bird War Domain Ancestor came to him.
